harness_sync_exception.reason: Boundary C needs the dispatch/review reform before any implementation or review dispatch, to prevent the P1-P6 model self-dispatch and claimed-verdict failures exposed by real-borrow-execution-v1.
harness_sync_exception.review_rebind_reason: The stage was still in stage-design with no head_sha, diff_fingerprint, or review artifact.
harness_sync_exception.historical_protocol_note: raw-plus-strict-json/v1 was removed because its capture helper and exact-single-JSON stdout contract are not part of the merged v0.5 reform. Review verdicts are parsed from the final parseable JSON object in the review artifact.

designer.scope: Boundary C live-borrow design and review draft; no implementation or live call

fix_rounds.bookkeeping_correction: The immutable dispatched prompt retains its pre-formal label; operator-attested /clear + /new restores the source review as formal REWORK without changing fix scope.

rationale: This is the first production debt-creating write adapter and requires fail-closed unknown-outcome handling.
The approved prior synthesis explicitly defined Boundary C, and the user narrowed this stage to direct backend integration with the existing frontend.
A fresh direction panel is skipped to keep the Harness lean; independent design review remains required before implementation.

direction_synthesis.approved_scope: Boundary C backend live borrowing using existing frontend; user-managed principal/amount/count risk

human_authorization.risk_control: operator-managed account principal plus amount_per_attempt plus success_target
human_authorization.post_accept_runtime_intent: After valid review acceptance and explicit merge/deploy approval, configure the deployment environment for live borrowing while retaining the reviewed fail-closed code default and explicit durable global Start gate
human_authorization.post_accept_risk_control_intent: operator-managed Binance margin plus task amount_per_attempt plus success_target; this is future deployment intent, not current merge/deploy/live-write authorization

design_review.summary: All four independent design reviews returned REWORK and were synthesized. Human-operated Opus 4.8 round 2 returned PASS_TO_DESIGN_AMENDMENT; its section 5 replacement intent is applied to the task/design/ADR. The section 6 official public-contract gate is closed with explicit fail-closed defaults. A user-selected Opus 4.8 breakdown now exists and awaits one targeted internal-consistency amendment before implementation dispatch.
